name: safefetch-required
behaviors: no raw fetch/http/https/got/axios calls in src/
open-notebook.js calls safeFetch() AND type-checks it (TypeError on missing)
model-catalog.js calls safeFetch() AND type-checks it
chat.js calls safeFetch() AND type-checks it
index.js has no direct HTTP calls (delegates to modules)
rationale: All network egress in @a1/ai must go through safeFetch (host-injected, egress-gated). No raw HTTP bypasses allowed.
